flows.name: Public Home Page Visit
flows.description: Any visitor lands on the public marketing/landing page

steps.action: Render public layout with navigation header (Sign in / Get started links) and footer
Render welcome placeholder page with heading and CTA copy

flows.successCriteria: Welcome page rendered with nav links to auth routes

flows.name: User Signup
flows.description: New user creates an account with email and password. Supabase sends a verification email.

steps.action: Render signup form inside auth layout (email, password >= 8 chars)
Extract email and password from FormData
Call supabase.auth.signUp() with emailRedirectTo pointing to /auth/callback
On error, return 400 with error message displayed inline
On success, redirect to /auth/verify-email with session cookies set

flows.successCriteria: Supabase user record created, verification email dispatched, user redirected to verify-email page
errorPaths: Duplicate email returns Supabase error displayed as inline error
Invalid email caught by HTML5 required/type=email validation
Password under 8 chars caught by minLength HTML5 attribute

flows.name: Email Verification Prompt
flows.description: After signup, user is shown a static page instructing them to check their email

steps.action: Render static card with instructions to check email and link back to login

flows.successCriteria: User sees instructions and follows email link to complete verification
errorPaths: No server-side resend mechanism - user must re-attempt signup to get a new email

flows.name: Auth Code Callback (PKCE Session Exchange)
flows.description: Supabase redirects user back to the app after email link click; code is exchanged for a session cookie
flows.actor: user clicking email verification or password reset link

steps.action: Extract code query parameter from URL
Call supabase.auth.exchangeCodeForSession(code) to establish session
Redirect to /dashboard with Set-Cookie headers containing the session

flows.successCriteria: Session cookie set, user lands on dashboard
errorPaths: If no code param is present, redirect to /dashboard still occurs (no error handling)

flows.name: User Login
flows.description: Existing user signs in with email and password

steps.action: Render login form with email, password fields and forgot-password link
Extract email and password from FormData
Call supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password })
On error, return 400 with Supabase error message displayed inline
On success, redirect to /dashboard with session cookies in response headers

errorPaths: Invalid credentials returns Supabase error (displayed inline)
Invalid email format blocked by HTML5 type=email validation

flows.name: Forgot Password
flows.description: User who cannot remember their password requests a reset link via email

steps.action: Render forgot-password form with email input
Extract email from FormData
Call supabase.auth.resetPasswordForEmail(email, { redirectTo: origin + /auth/reset-password })
On error, return 400 with error message
On success, show inline success message prompting user to check email

flows.successCriteria: Supabase dispatches password-reset email; success banner shown to user
errorPaths: Supabase error (e.g. rate limit, unregistered email) displayed inline
Invalid email format caught by HTML5 validation before submission

flows.name: Reset Password
flows.description: User arrives via password-reset email link and sets a new password
flows.actor: user with valid password-reset session token
flows.trigger: POST /auth/reset-password (after arriving via email link to GET /auth/reset-password)

steps.action: Render reset-password form with new password input (minLength 8)
Extract new password from FormData
Call supabase.auth.updateUser({ password }) using session established by the reset link
On error, return 400 with error message displayed inline
On success, redirect to /dashboard

flows.successCriteria: Password updated in Supabase Auth, user redirected to dashboard
errorPaths: Expired or invalid token causes Supabase error displayed inline
Password under 8 chars caught by HTML5 minLength

flows.name: Authenticated Dashboard Access
flows.description: Authenticated user views their dashboard. Unauthenticated access is redirected to login.

steps.action: Server loader calls supabase.auth.getUser() using session cookies
If no user in session, redirect to /auth/login with refreshed headers
Return user email to the component
Render dashboard shell: header with app name + sign out button, main with welcome message

flows.successCriteria: Authenticated user sees dashboard with their email displayed

flows.name: User Logout
flows.description: Authenticated user signs out by submitting the sign-out form on the dashboard
flows.trigger: POST /dashboard (form submission from Sign out button)

steps.action: User clicks Sign out button which submits a POST form
Server action calls supabase.auth.signOut() to invalidate session
Redirect to /auth/login with cleared session cookies

flows.successCriteria: Session invalidated, user redirected to login page

authModel.strategy: Supabase Auth - cookie-based SSR sessions via @supabase/ssr (PKCE code exchange)

guards.mechanism: server loader - supabase.auth.getUser() check with redirect to /auth/login on failure

gaps.description: No loader on /auth/reset-password to validate that the user arrived via a valid reset link before showing the password form
gaps.evidence: app/routes/auth/reset-password.tsx has no loader; the page renders unconditionally and the action calls updateUser blindly - will fail with a Supabase error if no valid session/token

gaps.description: No error handling when /auth/callback receives no code parameter
gaps.evidence: app/routes/auth/callback.tsx: if (!code) the exchangeCodeForSession call is skipped but redirect('/dashboard') still fires, landing an unauthenticated user on the dashboard where the loader will bounce them back

gaps.description: appConfig table has full CRUD service layer but is never read or written by any route or feature
gaps.evidence: app/lib/server/config.ts implements getConfig/setConfig/deleteConfig/getConfigCascade; no route file imports or calls these functions

gaps.description: app/lib/server/rate-limit.ts, events.ts, features.ts, form.ts, logger.ts exist but are not imported by any route
gaps.evidence: Files present in file tree but no route file references them; likely scaffolded as future utilities

gaps.description: app/lib/supabase/client.ts (browser Supabase client) is defined but not imported in any visible route or component
gaps.evidence: File exists in tree; all auth operations in routes use the server client from app/lib/supabase/server.ts

gaps.description: Dashboard has no application content - it is a placeholder with 'Start building your application here' copy
gaps.evidence: app/routes/dashboard/_index.tsx renders only user email and placeholder text; no sub-routes or features exist under /dashboard

gaps.description: Landing page has no real marketing content, pricing, or CTA linked to a product
gaps.evidence: app/routes/_index.tsx renders only 'Welcome / Start building your project.' - pure scaffold

gaps.description: No password confirmation field on signup or reset-password forms, creating risk of typo-locked accounts
gaps.evidence: app/routes/auth/signup.tsx and app/routes/auth/reset-password.tsx each have a single password field with no confirm-password field

gaps.description: /auth/reset-password has no guard to prevent authenticated users from accessing it
gaps.evidence: app/routes/auth/reset-password.tsx has no loader checking auth state; authenticated users could accidentally overwrite their password

gaps.description: specs/todo/modularity-upgrades.md indicates planned architectural improvements not yet implemented
gaps.evidence: File exists in specs/todo/ directory suggesting known future work items
